# Merkle-Hellman Knapsack Cryptosystem
# Public key and ciphertext only — can you break it?

# Ciphertext (subset sum of selected weights)
ciphertext = 377871620097617961118564429753371230556755674357458674183422085489758

# Message length: 27 bytes (216 bits)
